title: Business Emails: Writing Clear Messages
subtitle: Write and reply to clear, professional business emails
fit:
<!-- SCENARIO FIT — Aula 7
Can-do: "I can write and reply to a clear, professional business email."
Gramatica-alvo: email phrases (opening/closing), imperatives (Please find attached, Let me know), formal register.
Vocab-alvo: attachment, recipient, subject line, reply, forward, regards, draft, follow up.
Cenario escolhido: a caixa de entrada do Rafael — escrever e responder e-mails de trabalho (parceira Sarah + time juridico).
Por que elicita o alvo: escrever/responder e-mail OBRIGA abertura/encerramento formais, imperativos de e-mail e o vocab de e-mail. Aderencia >= 90%.
-->
<!-- CONTINUIDADE — Aula 7
Itens novos: attachment, recipient, subject line, reply, forward, regards, draft, follow up; email opening/closing phrases; imperatives.
Itens revisados (aulas 1-6): Could you (request, L4/L6), descrever empresa/cargo (L1/L2), present simple.
Callback no warm-up: slide 2 retoma a frase final da Aula 6 ('Could you send me the topics by email?') e a apresentacao (L1) — o aluno USA ambos para abrir o e-mail.
-->
